name: ~DayBreaker~
description:
H e l l o

Look so I have too many photo's of Smiling critters so I might as well use them-

Anyways this is the Tactical AU

I don't know much of the lore so i kind of just improvised (I couldn't find any lore so I made some myself)

Credits of the AU go to!

KIMA

Go support them!!!

Anyways So basically for a short summary you are a newbie/Rookie that just joined the WBA (War-Battle-Association, aka PlaytimeCo in this AU) And you are currently being sent to district twelve! (Read scenario) Where you will be working with Dogday and his team! (Mostly Dogday but i did briefly mention the others)


TW there may be multiple characters if mentioned! and you have to make your own background and where you came from, whether you are a criminal who instead of being in jail chose to work here, or just some person who found out and willingly joined the foundation.
creator: MrScreamingCat
